MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-27-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-27-2023 HEARING RE: RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENT AND DEFENDANT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO THE VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AND COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER NDIFORCHU, MD, FOMBE TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID RESPONDENT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $495.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $495.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER DENYING PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE(A167649, DIV 2)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69312461)

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2023 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. REBECCA L. SMITH, Esq. of California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 213-269-6475) for Respondent Medical Board of California;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Respondent and defendant Medical Board of California's demurrer to the verified petition for writ of mandate and complaint is sustained without leave to amend.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
